Interrupt Identification Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x14
Size:
0x4
Source:
reg_spec_ref.rdl

Description

Status of pending interrupts. Software write is ignored.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:4] - - - -
[3:1] ID r 0x0 ID
[0] TYPE r 0x1 Pending

Field Descriptions

TYPE - Pending

0: Pending, 1: No interrupt.
